data.title: AI TRENDS | Anthropic Valuation Reaches $800 Billion Amid Investor Interest
data.description: Anthropic, an artificial intelligence startup known for its Claude AI, has attracted significant attention from venture capital firms in recent weeks. According to Jin10, Business Insider reports that the company's valuation has soared to as high as $800 billion, reflecting the growing interest and investment in AI technologies.

data.title: Japan's Core Machinery Orders Surge in February
data.description: Japan's core machinery orders rose by 13.6% in February, surpassing expectations of a 1.1% decline, according to Jin10. The previous month's orders had decreased by 5.5%, highlighting a significant turnaround in February's performance. This unexpected increase suggests a potential recovery in Japan's machinery sector, which could have broader implications for the country's economic outlook.

data.title: X Introduces Cashtags Feature for Real-Time Financial Data Integration
data.description:
On April 15, X Product Lead and Solana Ecosystem Advisor Nikita Bier announced a new feature on the X platform. According to BlockBeats, the Cashtags feature has been launched for iPhone users in the United States and Canada, bringing real-time financial data directly into X.

The feature allows users to search or post Cashtags, or contract addresses, with X automatically recommending matching stocks or crypto tokens for easy asset selection. By clicking on any Cashtag, users can view related discussion threads and price charts without leaving the X platform.

This functionality ensures users can accurately match discussions to corresponding stocks or tokens. Cashtags represent the first step in X's ambition to become the preferred platform for financial and crypto communities. The platform aims to offer valuable and actionable content, facilitating seamless trading.

Additionally, X announced a pilot integration with Canadian brokerage Wealthsimple. Canadian users will see a button on the Cashtags page, enabling them to complete trades directly on the X platform.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Declares End to Iran Conflict in Recent Interview
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the conflict with Iran has concluded, according to BlockBeats. This statement was made during his latest interview with Fox News, where he also shared his perspectives on NATO and economic issues. The interview is scheduled to air on the evening of April 15, UTC+8. Trump had previously declared last month that the hostilities with Iran were 'essentially over.'

data.title: An account with over $1 million in winnings purchased $500,000 worth of NBA play-in tournament shares, resulting in the Hornets defeating the Heat.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that in the Polymarket "NBA Play-In Game Hornets vs. Heat" prediction event, an account with over $1 million in profits (address: 0xb6d6e99d3bfe055874a04279f659f009fd57be17) purchased $500,000 worth of bets on the Hornets defeating the Heat, with an average opening price of 68.8¢. The NBA Play-In Game Hornets vs. Heat will start at 7:30 AM Beijing time today. The loser of this game will be eliminated, while the winner will compete with the loser of the 76ers vs. Magic game for the last playoff spot in the Eastern Conference. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are set.

data.title: High-Stakes NBA Play-In Game: Hornets vs. Heat Betting Trends
data.description:
A significant bet has been placed on the NBA play-in game between the Charlotte Hornets and the Miami Heat. According to Odaily, an account with over $1 million in profits has invested $500,000 on the Hornets to defeat the Heat, with an average opening price of 68.8 cents.

The game is scheduled to begin at 7:30 PM UTC+8. The stakes are high, as the losing team will be eliminated, while the winner will face the loser of the game between the Philadelphia 76ers and the Orlando Magic for the final Eastern Conference playoff spot.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Discusses Tariff Levels and Economic Outlook
data.description:
U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant has indicated that President Donald Trump's tariff levels might return to their previous state before the Supreme Court nullified several imposition orders by early July. According to Jin10, following the Supreme Court's ruling that Trump's use of emergency powers to impose early tariffs was unconstitutional, Besant is exploring alternative authorizations, such as Section 301 investigations, to rebuild the 'tariff wall.'

Besant noted that while it is challenging to predict when the consequences of the Iraq war might impact the U.S. economy, the current economic conditions remain robust. He believes that the U.S. growth rate this year could easily surpass 3% or even 3.5%. Additionally, he mentioned that the continued decline in core inflation, excluding the more volatile energy and food prices, is a positive sign.

Besant stated, "I think the Federal Reserve has been wrong about inflation, as core inflation is decreasing. If they want to wait for clearer data before taking action, I understand, but that would mean interest rates should be lowered further."

data.title: South Korea's Unemployment Rate Declines in March
data.description: South Korea's unemployment rate fell to 2.7% in March, down from the previous rate of 2.9%. According to Jin10, this decrease indicates a positive trend in the country's labor market. The data suggests improvements in employment conditions, reflecting ongoing economic recovery efforts. Analysts are closely monitoring these developments as they assess the broader economic outlook for South Korea.

data.title: Crypto Market Experiences $670 Million in Liquidations Over 24 Hours
data.description: The cryptocurrency market witnessed significant liquidations amounting to $670 million in the past 24 hours. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass reveals that long positions accounted for $143 million of the liquidations, while short positions made up $527 million.

data.title: Federal Reserve Maintains Rates Amid Stable Economic Conditions
data.description:
The Federal Reserve has released the minutes from its February and March discount rate meetings, revealing that all 12 Reserve Banks unanimously voted to maintain the primary credit rate at 3.75%. According to NS3.AI, during the March 18 joint meeting with the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC), officials also decided to keep the federal funds target range steady at 3.5%–3.75% and the interest on reserve balances at 3.65%.

The decision was influenced by stable economic conditions and a reduction in tariff pressures. However, the directors expressed concerns over increasing nonlabor costs, particularly in the healthcare and energy sectors.

data.title: STOCKS | S&P 500 Rebounds Amid Optimism Over U.S.-Iran Peace Talks
data.description: On April 15, Jin10 reported that optimism surrounding the resumption of peace talks between the U.S. and Iran has led to a significant rebound in the S&P 500 Index, which is nearing its historical high. According to Jin10, this positive sentiment is expected to boost Asian stock markets at their opening. Steve Sosnick, Chief Strategist at Interactive Brokers, commented, "The key is not whether the peace talks have made substantial progress, but whether we can reasonably expect potential progress. The power of sentiment often outweighs reality." Strategist Michael Ball analyzed that the rise in the S&P 500 is driven by the market's belief that the war with Iran will not cause a widespread economic shock. With the ceasefire agreement holding, Saudi Arabia's east-west pipeline resuming operations, and Iran considering halting shipments through the Strait of Hormuz to advance negotiations, each headline about diplomatic efforts reduces perceived tail risks for traders.

data.title: CME Predicts Minimal Changes in Federal Reserve Interest Rates
data.description: The CME 'FedWatch' tool indicates a 1.6% probability of a 25 basis point rate hike by the Federal Reserve in April, with a 98.4% chance of maintaining current rates. According to ChainCatcher, projections for June show a 1.6% probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut, a 96.9% chance of unchanged rates, and a 1.5% probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate hike.

data.title: TRUMP Token VIP Access: Lower Entry Cost for Mar-a-Lago Event
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump's team has finalized the attendee list for an upcoming Mar-a-Lago event, offering VIP status at a significantly reduced cost. According to NS3.AI, attendees can now achieve VIP status with approximately $300,000 in TRUMP tokens, compared to the previous requirement of around $3 million. The top 29 registered holders qualified through a leaderboard system, which considered time-weighted holdings from March 12 to April 14, with additional points awarded for merchandise purchases. TRUMP tokens were recently trading near $2.80, marking a decline of about 96% from their all-time high.

data.title: Strategy's STRC ATM Sees $2.74 Billion Trading Volume in Two Sessions
data.description: Strategy's STRC ATM reported an estimated trading volume of $2.74 billion over two sessions this week, suggesting the acquisition of approximately 29,914 BTC through the ATM. According to NS3.AI, Tuesday alone contributed an estimated $1.57 billion to this volume. Throughout Monday and Tuesday, trading remained above the $100 par threshold, which triggers the mechanism. Strategy's latest 8-K filing confirmed a total of 13,927 BTC acquired over five trading days last week.

data.title: Canadian Oil and Gas Firms Focus on Financial Stability Amid Price Surge
data.description: Canadian oil and gas companies are prioritizing strengthening their financial positions and increasing shareholder returns instead of ramping up production, despite a recent surge in prices. Bloomberg posted on X that this decision comes in response to the ongoing conflict in Iran, which has significantly impacted global oil prices. The companies are opting to shore up their balance sheets, ensuring financial stability in a volatile market, rather than expanding output. This strategic move reflects a cautious approach to navigating the uncertainties in the global energy sector.

data.title: Presidio Bitcoin Launches GitHub Report on Bitcoin's Quantum Vulnerability
data.description: Presidio Bitcoin has introduced a GitHub-based living report focusing on Bitcoin's vulnerability to quantum computing and potential mitigation strategies. According to NS3.AI, the repository is designed to act as a central reference point, with updates planned as new research and proposals become available.

data.title: Telesat's Financial Turnaround Boosted by Defense Spending Surge
data.description: Telesat is working towards a challenging financial recovery. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that a surge in defense spending has improved the company's prospects. For further details, refer to the Canada Daily newsletter.

data.title: India's Battery and EV Manufacturing Still Heavily Reliant on China
data.description: India's efforts to boost its battery and electric vehicle (EV) manufacturing through the Make in India initiative have not reduced its reliance on China. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that despite significant investments, the dependency on Chinese imports remains substantial. The initiative aimed to enhance domestic production capabilities and reduce foreign dependency. However, the supply chain for critical components, particularly lithium-ion batteries, continues to be dominated by Chinese manufacturers. This ongoing reliance poses challenges for India's ambitions to become a global hub for EV production. The situation underscores the complexities of shifting supply chains and the need for strategic planning to achieve self-sufficiency in the sector.

data.title: Benjamin Cowen Reflects on Academic Influence in Crypto Commentary
data.description: Benjamin Cowen shared insights into how his academic background in graduate school and laboratory research has influenced his disciplined approach to crypto commentary. According to NS3.AI, Cowen spent the years from 2013 to 2018 studying radiation damage, which helped him develop a work ethic that he now applies to his platform, IntoTheCryptoverse, maintaining a non-promotional style.

data.title: U.S. Oil Tankers Head to Ports Amid Global Energy Crisis
data.description:
The White House has announced that 103 empty oil tankers are en route to U.S. ports to load American crude oil. According to BlockBeats, this move is part of the U.S. strategy to address the global oil and gas crisis, leveraging its record energy production to provide essential support worldwide.

The Trump administration highlighted that among these vessels, 54 are Very Large Crude Carriers (VLCCs), each capable of transporting approximately 2 million barrels of crude oil. Data from the U.S. Energy Information Administration indicates that the United States is the world's largest crude oil producer, with a daily production rate of 13 million barrels before the outbreak of war.

The U.S. exports around 11 million barrels of oil daily while importing 8 million barrels, positioning the country as a net exporter of oil.
